opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and face are on fire, and my throat feels dry and scratchy when I breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Thermal burn to face and chest from a barbeque flash fire, with concerning throat symptoms.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago while lighting an outdoor gas barbeque
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning pain across the chest and face, with blistering
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: cool water applied briefly helped a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: hoarse voice, tightness in the throat, coughed up dark sooty material shortly after the incident (per spouse)
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: highly distressed, pacing, still able to speak in full sentences currently

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and assisting; source of fire has been extinguished and the area is now safe

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants urgent pain relief and reassurance about breathing

access_barriers.transport: spouse present to assist but patient needs emergency transport, not private vehicle, given airway concern
